intro.title: Try Public APIs for free
intro.desc: The Public APIs repository is manually curated by community members like you and folks working at [APILayer](https://apilayer.com/?utm_source=Github&utm_medium=Referral&utm_campaign=Public-apis-repo). It includes an extensive list of public APIs from many domains that you can use for your own products. Consider it a treasure trove of APIs well-managed by the community over the years.

detalle.name: public-apis
detalle.desc: The Public APIs repository is manually curated by community members like you and folks working at APILayer. It includes an extensive list of public APIs from many domains that you can use for your own products. Consider it a treasure trove of APIs well-managed by the community over the years.
detalle.stack: python, typescript, javascript, react, docker, postgres
detalle.choose_if: necesitas exponer herramientas o contexto a agentes vía MCP
detalle.avoid_if: prefieres conexiones directas sin protocolo estándar
